title: DSL Camera Basic
teaches: Use a scene <Camera> track to create visible pan and zoom over world-space content.

title: DSL Circle Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Circle> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Component Basic
teaches: Define one Component inside Defs.

title: DSL Curve Basic
teaches: Animate one numeric property over time with curve().
curve() changes the property value over time; it does not morph the shape itself.

title: DSL Defs Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Defs> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Graph Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Graph> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Group Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Group> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Image Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Image> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Layer Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Layer> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Line Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Line> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL LinearGradient Basic
teaches: Use the basic <LinearGradient> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Masking Basic
teaches: Apply one Mask to one Group.

title: DSL Matte Basic
teaches: Use one Precompose as a matte for one Layer.

title: DSL Path Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Path> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Polyline Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Polyline> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL RadialGradient Basic
teaches: Use the basic <RadialGradient> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Rect Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Rect> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Scene Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Scene> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Sequence Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Sequence> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Sin Expression Basic
teaches: Animate one property with sin($time.sec).

title: DSL Text Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Text> pattern in MotionLoom.
Use renderScale="4x" to rasterize text at four times the pixel density without changing layout size.

title: DSL Timeline Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Timeline> pattern in MotionLoom.

title: DSL Track Basic
teaches: Use the basic <Track> pattern in MotionLoom.
Scene track z controls paint order only. Higher z draws later; it is not perspective depth.

title: DSL Use Basic
teaches: Instantiate one Component with Use.

title: Audio Spectrum
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: audio-reactive, random-animation, component, gradient, glow, shape.

title: Anica Agent UI Zoom Transition 10s
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: transition, timeline, layout, defs, text, shape.

title: Anica Motionloom Fancy Pip 20s
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: layout, timeline, text, shape, audio-reactive, defs.

title: Anica Promo Presentation 20s
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: layout, timeline, text, shape, defs, path.

title: Car Phone Hands Vector
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: layout, timeline, text, shape, defs, path.

title: Countdown Blur Zoom 6s
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: filter, text, layout, shape, transition, environment.

title: Filled Shape Morph Intro 10s
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: shape, path, curve-animation, gradient, defs, glow.

title: Kinetic Bloom 6s
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: glow, text, gradient, curve-animation, defs, shape.

title: Scene Full Feature Showcase
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: layout, timeline, text, shape, component, defs.

title: Stick Fight Storyboard 4shot
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: layout, timeline, text, shape, defs, path.

title: Asset Card Layout
teaches: Compose background, asset image, card shape, labels, glow, and animation timing into one scene.
Use layout as a feature label, while keeping domain as scene for graph-family classification.
Reference the renamed character1 asset path and internal DSL id naming.

title: Pinwheel Layer zDepth Logo
teaches: zDepth uses camera-space depth: negative is closer, positive is farther.
Use Layer zDepth for 3D-style ordering: larger positive values are farther and draw first.
Use negative Layer zDepth for nearer blades that scale larger and draw over farther blades.
Keep Track z as a paint-order tie-break while Layer zDepth controls depth ordering.

title: DSL FaceJaw Basic
teaches: Use <FaceJaw> to generate a character jaw or face-outline path from simple face-shape parameters.
Use closed=false for an open jaw curve, or closed=true with fill for a filled face/jaw shape.
Animate jawEase, chinSharpness, or trimEnd with curve() for simple facial motion.

title: Mask Follow Target
teaches: Use <Mask follow="node:id"> to make a mask track another scene node.
Apply the followed mask to a Group to reveal color or effects around the moving target.

title: Scene Layer3D Cards
summary: AE-like 2.5D scene layers using Layer3D z, rotationX, rotationY, and camera zoom.
teaches: Use Layer3D for flat scene content in pseudo-3D space.
Use z to sort near and far cards.
Use rotationX and rotationY for AE-like card tilt.

title: Scene Layer3D Static Background
summary: Compare Layer3D z-depth and X/Y rotation against a static cyber grid background.
teaches: Use a static detailed background to judge Layer3D motion.
Animate z to change apparent size and depth.
Animate rotationX and rotationY to show perspective card tilt.

title: Single Eye Left Turn Morph
summary: Animate a stylized single eye turning left with path morphs, primitive transforms, and deformGrid perspective warping.
teaches: Use path morphing to reshape an eye as it turns in perspective.
Combine scale, skew, and deformGrid to sell a side-facing eye rotation.
Keep iris, pupil, eyelid, and profile ridge transforms synchronized during a turn.

title: Stickman IK FK Template
teaches: Separate FK and IK into different timeline phases so inactive controls do not share the same screen.
Use FK parent-child rotations for a direct shoulder and elbow pose.
Use a two-bone IK target to make a wrist follow a moving point while the elbow solves automatically.

title: Puppet Pin Auto Mesh
teaches: Use Puppet with auto mesh for AE-style pin deformation.
Anchor part of the mesh with fixed pins while an animated pin pulls the surface.
Keep topology optional for simple deformation cases.

title: Puppet MeshTopology Advanced
teaches: Use MeshTopology only when auto mesh is not enough.
Define vertices, triangles, edges, and regions for advanced puppet structure.
Reference topology vertices from Pin nodes.

title: Pinwheel zDepth Layer Sorting 4s
teaches: Demonstrate layer zDepth ordering with four overlapping pinwheel blades.
Use separate layers and subtle curve animation to make depth sorting visible.

title: Aged Magic Book Title Reveal 7s
teaches: Combine a scene source with a bloom process pass.
Use layered gradients, paths, and typography for a fantasy title reveal.

title: Rainbow Spin 4s
teaches: Create a simple orbiting shape animation with one rotating group.
Use a small scene-only graph as a fast parser and preview sanity check.

title: ANICA Typewriter Float 8s
teaches: Build a vertical typewriter-style title sequence.
Layer ghost text, scanlines, stars, and cut lines for a mobile promo look.

title: ANICA Core Overload Reactor Explosion 10s
teaches: Create a high-energy logo reactor explosion with scene layers and post passes.
Chain hsla_overlay, glow_bloom, and gaussian blur in a GPU process pipeline.

title: Time Engine Museum 5s
teaches: Build a cinematic time-museum scene with one clear central clock engine as the subject.
Use HSLA and bloom post-processing for warm atmospheric grading.

title: Neon Collapse 5s
teaches: Create a cyberpunk black-hole collapse with layered city planes and neon glows.
Use bloom and HSLA process passes for high-contrast sci-fi grading.

title: Aurora Borealis Symphony 8s
teaches: Build a flowing aurora borealis scene with layered gradient curtains and star field.
Use path-based aurora waves, mountain silhouettes, lake reflection, and bloom post-processing.

title: Lotus Bloom Meditation 9s
teaches: Build a blooming lotus flower with layered petal rings using path trim animation.
Use sacred geometry mandala background, golden particles, and bloom post-processing.
Extend a scene with a 6-9 second closing aura, starburst, particle drift, and mantra title.

title: Solar Eclipse Corona 7s
teaches: Build a dramatic total solar eclipse with corona rays, solar flares, and diamond ring effect.
Chain hsla_overlay, glow_bloom, and gaussian blur in a GPU process pipeline for cinematic totality.

title: Phoenix Ascension Ember Storm 7s
teaches: Build a phoenix rising from ashes with path-trimmed feather wings and ember storm particles.
Use warm bloom, ember sweep light pass, and sin-based flicker vignette for fiery atmosphere.

title: Autumn Lantern Shrine Night 7s
teaches: Build a Japanese shrine night scene with glowing paper lanterns, torii gate, and falling maple leaves.
Use warm bloom, lantern sweep light pass, and sin-based flicker vignette for amber night atmosphere.

title: Astronomer's Celestial Atlas 7s
teaches: Build an aged celestial atlas with self-drawing constellation paths, compass rose, and candle-lit parchment.
Use warm bloom, starlight sweep light pass, and sin-based flicker vignette for astronomical atmosphere.

title: Deep Sea Bioluminescence Symphony 20s
teaches: Build a 20-second deep sea descent with glowing jellyfish, plankton, coral reef, and abyss core.
Use layered ocean gradients, bioluminescent bloom, rising bubbles, and sin-based flicker for underwater atmosphere.

title: Winter Aurora Cathedral 20s
teaches: Build a 20-second winter cathedral scene with Gothic architecture, stained glass windows, aurora, and snowfall.
Use layered aurora curtains, ice crystal paths, stained glass glow, and bloom for frozen atmospheric lighting.

title: Samurai Ink Storm 20s
teaches: A five-shot sumi-e action title sequence with ink clouds, samurai silhouette, cherry petals, katana slashes, and a red-white finale.
Use five timed scene groups, opacity crossfades, bloom process, gradients, paths, repeat fields, and numeric curve animation.

title: Clockwork Universe 20s
teaches: A five-shot cosmic machine sequence with brass gears, orbital clocks, star map rings, mechanical eclipses, and a universe-core finale.
Use five timed scene groups, opacity crossfades, bloom process, gradients, paths, repeat fields, and numeric curve animation.

title: Volcanic Genesis 20s
teaches: A five-shot elemental sequence with magma chambers, eruption plumes, lava rivers, ash lightning, and a newborn-island finale.
Use five timed scene groups, opacity crossfades, bloom process, gradients, paths, repeat fields, and numeric curve animation.

title: Audio Spectrum
teaches: Build a stylized audio spectrum using deterministic random motion to mimic frequency activity.
Use repeated bar groups, gradients, reflection shapes, text overlays, and frame-seeded random animation.

title: Business Bar Chart Animated
teaches: Create a polished business bar chart with reusable gradients and animated values.
Use Defs, grid lines, grouped bars, labels, and curve-driven bar growth.

title: Card Animation Layout
teaches: Animate a field of floating content cards with staggered opacity and layout variation.
Use grouped card components with text, circles, rounded rectangles, shadows, and simple time expressions.

title: Animated Path And Polyline
teaches: Compare animated Polyline and Path strokes in one compact scene.
Use trimStart/trimEnd, smoothstep expressions, labels, and endpoint markers.

title: Ease In Out Bezier Curve Demo
teaches: Compare named ease_in_out animation against a custom cubic Bezier easing curve.
Use curve(...) keyframes on line endpoints to visualize timing differences.

title: Green Screen Subscribe Animation 5s
teaches: Build a green-screen subscribe animation with only MotionLoom scene primitives.
Sequence cursor clicks, like activation, subscribe-to-subscribed transition, and bell ring animation using curve timing.

title: Base64 Oil Canvas Texture Parameters 6s
teaches: Embed a canvas texture directly in MotionLoom with a base64 data URI.
Animate texture_overlay parameters to compare strength, contrast, bump, and relief.

title: Base64 Paper Magnifier Typography 6s
teaches: Embed a paper texture directly with a base64 data URI.
Use the magnify_lens process effect for true circular lens remapping with glass/rim shading.
Combine magnify_lens with texture_overlay for paper-print material treatment.

title: Masked Typography Text 2s
teaches: Use a color precompose as source and a white TEXT precompose as luma matte.
Keep the scene static and primitive-only for direct GPU live preview testing.
Create a text-filled-color look without process post effects or unsupported blend modes.

title: Layer3D Neon Gallery
teaches: Use Layer3D to project flat 2D artwork with perspective.
Animate z and rotationY to create a near-card push.
Keep the background static to make Layer3D motion readable.

title: ANICA Neon Premium Promo
teaches: Build a long-form neon product promo with only procedural scene primitives.
Use ambient gradients, scanlines, and grain to create a premium motion-graphics look.
Sequence multiple typography beats with curve-driven zooms and opacity transitions.

title: ANICA Neon Premium Portrait Promo
teaches: Adapt the neon promo language to a vertical 1080x1920 layout.
Use portrait-safe composition, vertical workflow lines, and staged text groups.
Keep the design asset-free with gradients, repeats, and procedural texture.

title: ANICA Cyber Book Portrait
teaches: Create a cyber-noir illustrated book cover using only scene primitives.
Layer folds, scratches, dust, and page-turn highlights for a tactile composition.
Use timed groups to transition between cover, MotionLoom, and product-story beats.

title: Dual Eye Gaze Blink
teaches: Reuse a detailed eye component to build a mirrored two-eye character shot.
Animate coordinated gaze shifts with iris movement, squash, and subtle deformation.
Layer open-eye and closed-eye artwork to create a clean blink transition.

title: High Detail Bishoujo Eye Gaze Squint
teaches: Build a detailed anime-style eye from layered paths, gradients, and highlights.
Animate gaze left, return to center, and then narrow the eye into a squint.
Use grouped transforms to keep iris motion and eyelid compression coordinated.

title: Stickman Five Finger FK Rig
teaches: Build a five-finger hand with parented FK bone chains.
Animate finger curls by rotating each phalanx through Action and Pose keyframes.
Attach visible finger artwork to bones so child joints inherit parent motion.

title: Stickman IK FK Template
teaches: Separate FK and IK into different timeline phases so inactive controls do not share the same screen.
Use FK parent-child rotations for a direct shoulder and elbow pose.
Use a two-bone IK target to make a wrist follow a moving point while the elbow solves automatically.

title: Standing Character Vector
teaches: Build a full standing character from scene vector primitives.
Organize body parts into named groups for later rigging or animation.
Animate a waving arm with FK-style parent-child group rotations.

title: DSL Action Basic
teaches: Define the smallest Action with one Pose.

title: DSL Actor Basic
teaches: Place one Actor in a World.

title: DSL Bone Basic
teaches: Set one Bone transform inside a Pose.

title: DSL Material Basic
teaches: Attach one Material to an Actor.

title: DSL Pose Basic
teaches: Place a Pose inside an Action.

title: Two Actor Handshake Camera
teaches: Combine multiple MotionLoom features into a polished demo.
Use this as a reference for YouTube Short or promo-style output.
Study how features combine: glb-asset, character-action, character-rig, environment, camera, path.

title: Process Brightness
teaches: Use brightness as a Layer FX Process pass.
Set brightness to 1.0 for identity, or 1.3 for a brighter image.

title: Process Bloom Alias
teaches: Use effect="bloom" as a Process post-pass alias for layer FX.
Feed the selected layer into Process with Input from="input:clip0".
Control bloom with threshold, intensity, and sigma.

title: Process Glow Alias
teaches: Use effect="glow" as a readable alias for Process bloom in layer FX.
Keep one alias per Pass so examples are searchable and unambiguous.
Control glow with threshold, intensity, and sigma.

title: Process Glow Bloom Alias
teaches: Use effect="glow_bloom" as the explicit compatibility alias for bloom/glow in layer FX.
Keep alias examples split because one Pass has exactly one effect value.
Control the post-process halo with threshold, intensity, and sigma.

title: Process Gaussian 5-Tap Horizontal
teaches: Use effect="gaussian_5tap_h" for a horizontal 5-tap Gaussian blur pass.
Control blur strength with sigma.

title: Process Gaussian 5-Tap Vertical
teaches: Use effect="gaussian_5tap_v" for a vertical 5-tap Gaussian blur pass.
Control blur strength with sigma.

title: Process Gaussian 5-Tap Blur
teaches: Use effect="gaussian_5tap_blur" for a full 5-tap Gaussian blur (horizontal + vertical).
Control blur strength with sigma.

title: Process Glow Stack
teaches: Use effect="glow_stack" for cinematic multi-radius glow.
Control glow threshold, intensity, radii, and tint.

title: Process Tone Map
teaches: Use effect="tone_map" for exposure, contrast, shoulder, gamma, and saturation.
Use tone mapping after glow/bloom to control highlights.

title: Process Light Sweep
teaches: Use effect="light_sweep" for an animated directional highlight.
Control sweep position, angle, width, softness, intensity, and color.

title: Process Opacity Pulse
teaches: Use effect="opacity" for whole-layer alpha control.
Animate opacity with curve(...) for fades, pulses, and beat-style visibility changes.

title: Process HSLA Overlay
teaches: Use effect="hsla_overlay" for animated color wash and tinting.
Control hue, saturation, lightness, and alpha independently.

title: Fixed Opacity Layer FX
teaches: Use effect="opacity" for fixed whole-layer alpha control.
Use opacity in the 0.0-1.0 range; this example uses 0.3.

title: Fixed HSLA Overlay Layer FX
teaches: Use effect="hsla_overlay" for a fixed color wash over a layer.
Control hue, saturation, lightness, and alpha with numeric process params.

title: Paper Texture Overlay
teaches: Use effect="texture_overlay" for procedural paper/grain texture.
Use <Texture /> in <Defs> as the scene-side texture metadata surface.

title: Process Pass Mask
teaches: Use mask="..." on <Pass> to limit a process effect to a mask texture.
Use maskMode="luma" when the mask texture is black and white.

title: Scene World Process Composition Basic
teaches: Mix Scene, World, and Process graph families in one composition graph.
Use Scene and World outputs as Process textures, then present the final Process from the Graph root.
Keep one root-level <Present> node as the final child of <Graph>.

title: Text Pill Box
teaches: Use Text box="pill" to create an auto-sized rounded background behind text.
Use fontWeight and textGap to tune bold condensed title-card typography.
Use transparent Background for overlay-ready pill text exports.

title: Neon Mono Glow
teaches: Create a neon mono glow typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Gold Serif Extrude
teaches: Create a gold serif extrude typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Condensed Impact Poster
teaches: Create a condensed impact poster typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Soft Pastel Rounded
teaches: Create a soft pastel rounded typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Terminal Hacker Type
teaches: Create a terminal hacker type typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Retro Chrome Stack
teaches: Create a retro chrome stack typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Brush Script Accent
teaches: Create a brush script accent typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Editorial Magazine Serif
teaches: Create a editorial magazine serif typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Cyber Gradient Label
teaches: Create a cyber gradient label typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Minimal Kinetic Sans
teaches: Create a minimal kinetic sans typography treatment.
Layer duplicate Text nodes to simulate depth, glow, shadow, or emphasis without external assets.
Use fontFamily, fontWeight, textGap, and simple primitives to build reusable text styles.

title: Text AA Soft Edge Blur
teaches: Use renderScale auto for cleaner default text rasterization.
Use antialias presets and softEdge or edgeSmoothing to reduce hard pixel edges.
Use blur on Text for soft glow or defocus treatments.

title: Fearless RGB Glitch Typography
teaches: Build RGB glitch typography by layering offset Text nodes.
Use deterministic noise, scanlines, and slice rectangles for a digital glitch look.
Sequence motivational text beats with simple opacity and scale curves.

title: Bass Pulse Six-Line RGB Glitch Portrait
teaches: Cut a 9-second portrait typography promo into six 1.5-second music beats.
Use deterministic bass-style pulses, RGB split, side meters, scanlines, and beat flashes.
Keep short motivational phrases readable while matching fast DnB-style music energy.
